meaning: adj.遍及全州的,全州范围的
examples: She won 10% of the vote statewide.
He argues that we need statewide uniformity.
These voters often determine the outcome of statewide elections.
She said Oklahoma already has one of the largest statewide incentive programs for storm shelters.
"They know with one push of an e-mail, you can send out something statewide, " Szakos said.
